panels.title: Active alerts
panels.description: Firing / pending windex alerts (rules provisioned from ops/grafana/alerting/windex-rules.yml). Empty = healthy.

panels.title: Uptime — dependencies & loops
panels.description: Red = the signal reported 0 (down) in that interval. One row per external dependency and per embed-loop, so an outage's blast radius and its exact timing are visible in one place.

panels.title: Degraded / error share
panels.description: Share of searches that fell back to lexical (degraded) or errored. The 5% / 20% threshold lines mirror the SearchErrorRate alert.

panels.title: Query-embed failures / min
panels.description: Query embeds that timed out or hit a refused connection. Sustained failures trip windex_query_breaker_state to open (see Query breaker).

panels.title: NDCG@k by leg
panels.description: Relevance of the latest `windex eval` run, by leg (known_item / golden / judge). The 0.8 line is the SearchQualityRegression alert threshold; known_item is the always-on health line.

panels.title: HTTP error rate (4xx / 5xx)
panels.description: Server errors (5xx) drive the ApiHighErrorRate alert; 4xx shown for context.

panels.title: Background jobs (non-loop)
panels.description: gh discover/hydrate, ingest/harvest passes, the scheduler, … (windex_job_up).

panels.title: Gateway probe duration
panels.description: Wall time of the cached embedding-gateway TCP probe (~30s cache).

panels.title: $source — embed log staleness
panels.description: Seconds since the embed-loop log last moved; yellow >5m, red >15m (a wedged-but-alive loop).
